Interface SVInstantiations

All Known Implementing Classes:
SVInstantiations
public interface SVInstantiations
Implementations of this interface know which schema variables have been matched and their respective instantiations.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <T> @Nullable T
    getInstantiation(@NonNull SchemaVariable sv)
    checks whether the given schema variable has been instantiated and returns its instantiation otherwise null is returned
    @NonNull ImmutableMap<@NonNull SchemaVariable, @NonNull InstantiationEntry<?>>
    getInstantiationMap()
    returns a map that contains all instantiated schema variables and their respective instantiation
    boolean
    isInstantiated(@NonNull SchemaVariable sv)
    checks whether the given schema variable has been instantiated
    <T> @Nullable T
    lookupValue(Name name)
    checks whether a schema variable of the specified name has been instantiated and returns its instantiation otherwise null is returned
    @Nullable SchemaVariable
    lookupVar(Name name)
    retrieves the schema variable of the specified name if it has already been instantiated, otherwise null is returned
    SVInstantiations
    union(SVInstantiations other, LogicServices services)
    returns a new SVInstantiations object that contains all instantiations contained in this and the other SVInstantiations object

  • Method Details

    • lookupVar

      @Nullable SchemaVariable lookupVar(Name name)
      retrieves the schema variable of the specified name if it has already been instantiated, otherwise null is returned
      Parameters:
      name - Name of the schema variable
      Returns:
      the SchemaVariable

    • lookupValue

      <T> @Nullable T lookupValue(Name name)
      checks whether a schema variable of the specified name has been instantiated and returns its instantiation otherwise null is returned
      Parameters:
      name - Name of the schema variable
      Returns:
      the instantiation of the schema variable, null if no instantiation for a schema variable of the specified name is available

    • getInstantiation

      <T> @Nullable T getInstantiation(@NonNull SchemaVariable sv)
      checks whether the given schema variable has been instantiated and returns its instantiation otherwise null is returned
      Parameters:
      sv - the SchemaVariable
      Returns:
      the instantiation of the schema variable, null if no instantiation for the schema variable is available

    • isInstantiated

      boolean isInstantiated(@NonNull SchemaVariable sv)
      checks whether the given schema variable has been instantiated
      Parameters:
      sv - the SchemaVariable
      Returns:
      true if and only if an instantiation of the schema variable is available

    • getInstantiationMap

      @NonNull ImmutableMap<@NonNull SchemaVariable, @NonNull InstantiationEntry<?>> getInstantiationMap()
      returns a map that contains all instantiated schema variables and their respective instantiation
      Returns:
      a map that contains all instantiated schema variables and their respective instantiation

    • union

      SVInstantiations union(SVInstantiations other, LogicServices services)

      returns a new SVInstantiations object that contains all instantiations contained in this and the other SVInstantiations object

      For performance reasons it is the responsibility of the caller to ensure that the union can be computed, e.g. to ensure that no schema variable is instantiated with different values

      Implementations might perform their own (partial) checks and throw a runtime exception if this assumption is violated.

      Parameters:
      other - the SVInstantiations with which to merge
      services - the LogicServices
      Returns:
      the union of the instantiations
